voices.description: TanySmile - Calm & Kind - Narrative and storytelling voice with a calm, warm tone. Central male accent, clear and simple delivery, ideal for engaging narration.

voices.name: Lam Ngo - Natural, friendly voice
voices.description: A natural male voice from Southern Vietnam. Smooth and resonant, it creates an intimate yet profound atmosphere—much like a personal conversation.

voices.name: My - Soft and Warm Narrator
voices.description: Mc Hà My - Vietnames - calm and kind - Vietnamese female voice, youthful yet graceful. Natural warmth, gentle tone, with clear articulation and subtle emotional depth. Suitable for virtual assistants, customer service, and engaging user experiences.

voices.name: Tony Nguyễn
voices.description: Middle-aged male voice from Northern Vietnam.

voices.name: Thang - Clear, Firm and Steady
voices.description: Thang - A standard Southern Vietnamese voice, suitable for audio books, storytelling and news, and film genres.

voices.name: Duyen - Sweet, Calm and Gentle
voices.description: Duyen from Quang Nam - Social Media - Vietnamese female voice with a gentle Central accent is soft yet professional, making it ideal for e-learning, guided meditations, hospitality introductions, YouTube narration, and brand videos. Its refined tone carries warmth and clarity, creating a sense of trust and calm professionalism that resonates in both educational and corporate contexts. Perfect for anyone seeking a voice that is sweet, approachable, and polished.

voices.name: Tuan Anh - Deep & Narrative
voices.description: Professional Vietnamese male voice with a deep, warm, and authoritative tone. Expertly suited for mysterious documentaries, long-form narration, corporate branding, and educational storytelling. High-fidelity studio quality with clear articulation and engaging pacing.

voices.name: Nation - Warm, Expressive & Nuanced
voices.description: Deep, warm voice; fluent delivery; storytelling and narration; announcer.

voices.name: Khanh - Dynamic and Conversational
voices.description: Khanhlq - Southern accent, dynamic. Great for casual conversation.

voices.name: Xuan Toan - Clear, Calm and Articulate
voices.description: Xuan Toan - A clear, calm, and articulate male voice with a medium pitch. The tone is generally even and measured, conveying a sense of thoughtful delivery. There's a natural, slightly resonant quality that makes it pleasant to listen to, without being overly deep or booming. It's well-suited for narration, informative content, or any application where a stable and engaging vocal presence is desired.

voices.name: Hùng - Northern Accent
voices.description: My voice has a professional, clear, and expressive style, suitable for video narration, commercials, podcasts, audiobooks, and AI voice assistants. The tone is natural and warm while maintaining depth and credibility, creating an engaging and accessible listening experience. I can adapt emotions flexibly — from energetic and modern to calm and refined — to fit different contexts and creative needs.

voices.name: Rin Dinh - Deep, Warm and Serious
voices.description: Dinh Rin - Deep and warm male voice.

voices.name: Emma - Calm, Soothing and Mature
voices.description: Calm, soothing, mature Vietnamese young woman - Calm, soothing, mature voice of woman in their young ages, good for story telling, narrative scripts.

voices.name: Huynh Duong - Energetic and Confident
voices.description: Huynhduong - My voice is strong, full of liberal energy and proud confidence. A voice reveals the spirit of freedom, ready to conquer all horizons!

voices.name: Thanh - Deep, Calm and Steady
voices.description: Thích Thanh - A deep, slow, and clear voice, expressing the compassion, wisdom, and calmness typical of a Zen master. A gentle tone, with a standard Southern accent, conveys a sense of peace and understanding. Suitable for Buddhist teachings, meditation, and profound spiritual content.

voices.name: Hung Tran - Deep, Calm and Reflective
voices.description: Tran kim hung - 30 years old A Southern Vietnamese man's voice with a deep voice tone, suitable for narrating mystery and horror stories or romantic podcasts.

voices.name: Joe - Confident Idiot
voices.description: Uneducated, oblivious male. Endlessly opinionated. Great for blunt, rude, annoying and incorrect content. American male. A funny voice by Hey Its Brad.

voices.name: Steve - Calm, Expressive and Balanced
voices.description: Steve -  Calm & Expressive - Native Northern English senior male voice originally from the Lancashire area of Britain. After living in southern England, the Welsh borders and now 30 years in the USA, it has developed into a warm English voice with softer signs of that original accent. Perfect for realistic English narration with an unusual twist, and certainly different to the normal English speech.
